name: docx-preview
when_to_use: 需要在浏览器内把 DOCX 二进制渲成保留分页、页眉页脚、图片和样式的 HTML 预览时用它而非手写 OOXML 解析,因为原生手写在 ZIP 关系解析、Word 样式级联和分页还原上失败;非做文档编辑、回写或像素级 Word 克隆。
why_valuable: AI 默认无法直接解析 DOCX ZIP 二进制;更做不到解析 OOXML relationships、编号、字体、页眉页脚、图片并映射成可读 HTML/CSS。

data_in.note: picks 主结构词为 text-span,但真实原生入口吃 .docx bytes 而不是文本;document 必须是 Blob、ArrayBuffer 或 Uint8Array,renderAsync 是上游声明的稳定 API。

schema.document: Blob | ArrayBuffer | Uint8Array —— 完整 .docx 二进制,不可传解压 XML 或纯文本

options?._default: 未提供时使用下列上游默认值

spec.note: 分页文档会很长;boot 给预览容器默认 600px 高并滚动,AI 可传其他明确像素值,禁止百分比或视口单位。保留页面宽高由 ignoreWidth/ignoreHeight 控制。

carriers.widget: conditional:必须给 shadow 内独立 styleContainer,否则生成 CSS 会落错作用域;需 Blob/ArrayBuffer、JSZip 与对象 URL 浏览器能力
carriers.codex: supported:ESM CDN + 浏览器二进制/ZIP/Blob API;生成样式与文档内容均限制在 sandbox iframe

isolation.evidence: Verified: +esm exports `Ot as renderAsync`; d.ts sig `renderAsync(data: Blob|any, bodyContainer: HTMLElement, styleContainer?: HTMLElement, userOptions?: Partial<Options>)` matches boot arg order exactly. All 16 schema option keys exist in Options interface; defaultOptions confirmed {breakPages:true, className:'docx', inWrapper:true, hideWrapperOnPrint:false, ignoreWidth/Height/Fonts:false, debug:false, experimental:false, trimXmlDeclaration:true,...}. globalStyleInjection=no: 0 `document.head` in source — styles are written into the caller-supplied styleContainer param (widget boot passes a shadow-internal one). globalDomMutation=no: no persistent portal; the only document.body touch is helper `function Ft(a=document.body){e=createElement('div'); a.appendChild(e); ...; a.removeChild(e)}` (called as Ft()) — a transient pt→px measuring div appended and immediately removed. globalEvents=no: 0 window/document.addEventListener. shadowCompatible=conditional: fully works in shadow DOM IF both body+style containers are shadow-internal (widget boot does this); default document.head styleSink would leak, hence conditional.
